artifact.source:
<section>
  <Card title="ERROR rate over time" description="logs/app.log — 100 lines, one hour (09:00–10:00), bucketed in 10-minute windows" maxWidth="lg" centered="true">
    <Chart kind="bar" title="ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket" x="bucket" y="errors" height="360" data='[{"bucket":"09:00","errors":0},{"bucket":"09:10","errors":1},{"bucket":"09:20","errors":5},{"bucket":"09:30","errors":11},{"bucket":"09:40","errors":4},{"bucket":"09:50","errors":1}]' />
    <Stack direction="horizontal" gap="lg" justify="center">
      <Metric label="Total errors" value="22" detail="matches hourly_summary errors=22" />
      <Metric label="Peak bucket" value="09:30" delta="11 errors" trend="up" tone="danger" />
    </Stack>
    <Text variant="muted">Errors cluster sharply in the 09:30 bucket, driven by a pricing upstream outage (econnrefused) that trips the circuit breaker (circuit_opened at 09:33:33) and returns 503s until the probe recovers around 09:40.</Text>
  </Card>
</section>

toolInput.title: Chart the error rate over time from a log file on disk
toolInput.markup:
<section>
  <Card title="ERROR rate over time" description="logs/app.log — 100 lines, one hour (09:00–10:00), bucketed in 10-minute windows" maxWidth="lg" centered="true">
    <Chart kind="bar" title="ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket" x="bucket" y="errors" height="360" data='[{"bucket":"09:00","errors":0},{"bucket":"09:10","errors":1},{"bucket":"09:20","errors":5},{"bucket":"09:30","errors":11},{"bucket":"09:40","errors":4},{"bucket":"09:50","errors":1}]' />
    <Stack direction="horizontal" gap="lg" justify="center">
      <Metric label="Total errors" value="22" detail="matches hourly_summary errors=22" />
      <Metric label="Peak bucket" value="09:30" delta="11 errors" trend="up" tone="danger" />
    </Stack>
    <Text variant="muted">Errors cluster sharply in the 09:30 bucket, driven by a pricing upstream outage (econnrefused) that trips the circuit breaker (circuit_opened at 09:33:33) and returns 503s until the probe recovers around 09:40.</Text>
  </Card>
</section>
